filter.title: FILTER FLAGGED ITEMS
filter.description: These were flagged by the agent. Decide what belongs in your pipeline.
filter.hint: ←→ select · ↓/⏎ accept · ↑ back · ⌫ discard · E thread
filter.reason.job_seeker_desc: Someone looking for work or employment
filter.reason.collections_desc: Invoice dispute or overdue payment follow-up
filter.reason.platform_bid_desc: Bid invitation from Procore, BuilderTrend, etc.
filter.reason.warranty_desc: Past client reporting an issue after completion
consolidate.title: CONSOLIDATE CONTACTS
consolidate.description: These contacts appear to be from the same company.
triage.title: TRIAGE LEADS
triage.description: Mark past projects as won or lost. Everything else stays active.
confirm.title: CONFIRM PIPELINE
confirm.description: Review your active leads and adjust stages before import.
confirm.noLeadsDesc: All leads were discarded or marked as won/lost in previous steps.
wizard.title: Import Your Pipeline
wizard.description: Connect your email, analyze patterns, and import your pipeline
wizard.noConnection: No connection found. Please go back and connect your email.
wizard.closeDescription: Your progress will be saved and can be resumed later.
wizard.notify.importAwayTitle: Import completed while you were away
wizard.notify.analysisAwayTitle: Analysis completed while you were away
connect.intro: Connect your business email to automatically discover and import your pipeline.
connect.redirectNote: You'll be redirected to authorize. OPS requests full mailbox access to find leads, label threads, and draft replies on your behalf.
analyze.intro: Scanning your inbox for business patterns and potential leads.
analyze.minimize: Minimize — we'll notify you when it's ready
confirmSources.summary: We found {sources} sources and {leads} potential leads.
confirmSources.toggleHint: Toggle off any sources you want to exclude from the import.
confirmSources.estimateHelp: This is the subject line you use when sending estimates to clients. We'll use it to identify your pipeline conversations.
confirmSources.desc.platform: Emails from this platform that may contain leads or bid invitations
confirmSources.desc.forwarder: This team member forwards customer inquiries to you
confirmSources.desc.ai_detected: These emails were identified by AI as likely customer conversations
confirmSources.desc.estimate_pattern: Threads where you've sent estimates to potential clients
confirmPipeline.labeledNotice: Your imported leads have been labeled as {label} in your inbox.
confirmPipeline.patternDesc: emails from new contacts that match your detected patterns (form submissions, estimate requests, inquiry subjects) are automatically classified as leads.
confirmPipeline.aiDesc: new inbound emails are analyzed to detect potential leads, even if they don't match an existing pattern.
confirmPipeline.manualDesc: apply the {label} label to any email thread in Gmail and it will be imported on the next sync.
confirmPipeline.captureNote: New leads appear in your pipeline for review. You can adjust detection sensitivity in Settings.
activate.syncNote: Real-time sync via push notifications is always active. Scheduled sync runs as a safety net.
activate.partialNote: Scheduled sync is running. To enable real-time updates, reconnect the inbox from Settings.
importProgress.intro: Creating clients, leads, and linking email threads.
importProgress.stalled: Import appears to have stalled. The server may have timed out. Try re-running the import.
importProgress.minimize: Minimize — we'll notify you when it's ready
intake.emailSampleHint: Paste emails separated by --- or one at a time. Shift+Enter for new lines.
